critical_notes:

- Inventory at $2,492,140 represents ~147 days — above target
- Year-over-year revenue is up 14% vs February 2025

- 25 customers have cross-sell opportunities across product categories

- 215 orders placed in L3M (avg $12,852 per order)
- 19 new customers acquired in L3M: Ace Bus Charter, Brake & Truck Supply, Canyon State Bus Sales
- Order backlog of $1,451,493 across 52 orders (avg age: 38 days)
- $550,358 (38%) of backlog expected to ship within 30 days
